title: Doctor Prescribing Medicine 医生开药
scene: 医生给Lily开药并交代用法。

lines.en: Lily, I am going to give you some medicine.
OK, Doctor. How many pills do I take?
lines.zh: 好的，医生。我要吃几片药？

lines.en: These are antibiotics. Take one pill twice a day.
lines.zh: 这是消炎药。每天两次，每次一片。

lines.en: For five days. Do not stop even if you feel better.
lines.zh: 吃五天。即使感觉好了也不要停。

lines.en: Can I take it on an empty stomach?
No, take it after breakfast and after dinner.
lines.zh: 不行，早饭后和晚饭后吃。

lines.en: You might feel a little sleepy. That is normal.
lines.zh: 你可能会觉得有点困。那很正常。

lines.en: Thank you, Doctor. I understand now.
